phrases.intent_en: Ask what the neighbourhood is like in the evening
phrases.text_local: Quelle est l'ambiance du quartier du port le soir ?
phrases.pronunciation: KEL eh lam-BYANSS doo kar-TYAY doo POR leh SWAR
phrases.cultural_note: The Port area has a relaxed neighbourhood feel — less touristy than Vieux-Nice, with good local restaurants around Place Garibaldi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy ferry tickets to Corsica
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je acheter des billets de ferry pour la Corse ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zheh ash-TAY day bee-YAY deh FEH-ree poor lah KORS
phrases.cultural_note: Ferry companies Corsica Ferries and La Méridionale have offices near Port Lympia. Book in advance in summer.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, right at the port entrance.
responses.phonetic: OO pwee zhuh ah-SHTAY day bee-YAY duh feh-REE poor lah KORS
responses.local: Au guichet principal, juste à l'entrée du port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are good seafood restaurants near the port
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il de bons restaurants de fruits de mer près du port ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL deh BON res-to-RAN deh frwee deh MEHR preh doo POR
phrases.cultural_note: The quais around Port Lympia are lined with seafood restaurants — generally better value than those on Cours Saleya.

responses.english: Yes, there are excellent ones on the port quays.
responses.phonetic: ES suh keel YA duh BON RES-toh-rahnt duh FRWEE duh MAIR PRAY dyu POR
responses.local: Oui, il y en a d'excellents sur les quais du port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the colourful houses on the hillside above the port
phrases.text_local: Comment s'appelle ce quartier aux maisons colorées au-dessus du port ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MAN sah-PEL seh kar-TYAY oh may-ZON ko-lo-RAY oh-deh-SOO doo POR
phrases.cultural_note: The hillside neighbourhood of Mont Boron rises above the port with splendid Riviera villas and sea views.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to walk from the port to Vieux-Nice
phrases.text_local: Comment se rendre à pied du port au Vieux-Nice ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MAN seh RAN-dreh ah PYAY doo POR oh vyuh-NEES
phrases.cultural_note: Vieux-Nice is a 10-minute walk west from Port Lympia, with the option of climbing up through Castle Hill park.

responses.english: Cross the port and go up Rue Cassini.
responses.phonetic: kaw-MAHN suh RAHN-druh ah PYAY dyoo poor oh VYUH nees
responses.local: Traversez le port et remontez la rue Cassini.
